expectations.text: biome.jsonc pins $schema to Biome 2.x
expectations.evidence: $schema = 'https://biomejs.dev/schemas/2.4.13/schema.json'

expectations.text: Formatter indent is 2-space
expectations.evidence: formatter.indentStyle='space', indentWidth=2

expectations.text: Formatter lineWidth is 100
expectations.evidence: formatter.lineWidth=100

expectations.text: JS formatter uses single quotes, no semicolons, trailing commas all
expectations.evidence: quoteStyle='single', semicolons='asNeeded', trailingCommas='all'

expectations.text: Tailwind v4 directives enabled (css.parser.tailwindDirectives: true)
expectations.evidence: css.parser.tailwindDirectives=True

expectations.text: Vue files get an override disabling noise-prone rules (useConst/useImportType/noUnused*)
expectations.evidence: vue override disables 4 of the 4 target rules

expectations.text: Nuxt build output (.nuxt + .output) excluded from files.includes
expectations.evidence: files.includes has 9 entries; .nuxt present: True; .output present: True

expectations.text: package.json scripts include format, lint, check, and ci invoking biome
expectations.evidence: script keys present: ['check', 'check:fix', 'ci', 'format', 'lint', 'lint:fix']; missing from required set: []; biome-invoking scripts: 6

expectations.text: Response calls out that Vue support is experimental / partial
expectations.evidence: response.md length=6053; contains 'vue': True; contains one of the experimental keywords: True

expectations.text: Gives exact `biome migrate prettier --write` command
expectations.evidence: found

expectations.text: Gives exact `biome migrate eslint --write` command
expectations.evidence: found

expectations.text: Lists old config files to delete (eslint.config.js + .prettierrc.json at minimum)
expectations.evidence: mentions eslint config file: True; mentions prettierrc: True

expectations.text: Lists packages to uninstall (eslint + prettier + @typescript-eslint/* or eslint-plugin-unicorn)
expectations.evidence: remove cmd: True; eslint: True; prettier: True; @typescript-eslint: True; unicorn: True

expectations.text: package.json scripts block uses `biome check` and `biome ci`
expectations.evidence: 'biome check' present: True; 'biome ci' present: True

expectations.text: Updated lint-staged config uses `biome check --write` with `--no-errors-on-unmatched`
expectations.evidence: lint-staged: True; biome check --write: True; --no-errors-on-unmatched: True

expectations.text: Gotchas section mentions Biome's default indent is tab
expectations.evidence: 'tab' in text: True; 'default' in text: True

expectations.text: Gotchas section mentions `migrate eslint` disables recommended:true or replaces it
expectations.evidence: 'recommended' mentioned: True; coupled with disable/replaces/overwrites/explicit-list keywords

expectations.text: Mentions ESLint YAML configs are not supported by migrate
expectations.evidence: 'yaml' in text: True; with support-negation or convert keyword

expectations.text: Mentions ESLint kebab-case vs Biome camelCase rule names
expectations.evidence: 'camelCase' present: True; 'kebab-case' present: True

expectations.text: lefthook.yml uses `stage_fixed: true`
expectations.evidence: present

expectations.text: lefthook runs `biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown`
expectations.evidence: has check:True; --write:True; --no-errors-on-unmatched:True; --files-ignore-unknown:True

expectations.text: lefthook passes {staged_files} to biome
expectations.evidence: present

expectations.text: bitbucket-pipelines.yml uses `biome ci` (not `biome check`)
expectations.evidence: 'biome ci' present: True

expectations.text: bitbucket-pipelines.yml scopes to changed files with --changed
expectations.evidence: present

expectations.text: bitbucket-pipelines.yml emits a JUnit report
expectations.evidence: --reporter=junit present: True; xml artifact path mentioned: True

expectations.text: JUnit file exposed as a Pipelines artifact (or via test-reports/)
expectations.evidence: 'artifacts:' present: True; 'test-reports' present: True; 'test-results' present: False

expectations.text: biome-config-patch enables vcs.enabled:true with defaultBranch set
expectations.evidence: vcs.enabled=True, vcs.defaultBranch='main'

expectations.text: Response warns about needing full git history / deep clone for --changed
expectations.evidence: response mentions clone depth / shallow keyword: True
